caption: A computer screen displays a terminal window running a server log, showing a series of HTTP requests with timestamps and status codes such as "200" and "400." Legible text includes "GET /rapagece http/1.0" and "GET /nicolas http/1.0," along with a command prompt showing "docker-compose up." In the top right corner, a small circular profile picture of a man wearing a dark suit and tie is visible. As the sequence progresses, a cursor appears in the terminal, and the text "docker-compose up" is typed out. A white vertical cursor blinks at the end of the line, and a new line begins with the text "Creating network...", "Creating volume...", and "Starting kubernetes_v_01_proxy_frontend_1...". The overall scene is a screen recording of a developer interacting with a command-line interface to start a containerized environment.
